---
title: " "
# image: images/pic.jpg
# about:
#   template: marquee
#   image-width: 20em
#   image-shape: rounded
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="55%"}
## Biography

<br>
I am currently engaged as a Doctoral Researcher within the [Department of Public Health and Nursing](https://www.ntnu.edu/ism) at the [Norwegian University of Science and Technology](https://www.ntnu.edu/).

My academic journey includes the successful completion of a Master of Philosophy and a Master of Science, specializing in Biostatistics and Demography, from the [International Institute for Population Sciences](https://www.iipsindia.ac.in/).

:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/pic.jpg)
:::
:::

In addition to my academic pursuits, I have gained practical experience in the field of Health Economics Outcome Research. I served as an Associate in the Advanced Analytics team at [Parexel](https://www.parexel.com/), further honing my skills and knowledge.

My professional interests are multifaceted, encompassing applied statistics and data analytics within the healthcare sector. My research interests are particularly focused on statistical genetics and precision medicine. Furthermore, I am intrigued by the economic evaluation of innovative drugs and therapies. I take pleasure in programming using various statistical analysis software, which aids in my research and professional work.

::: columns
::: {.column width="25%"}
## Interests
* Celiac/Autoimmune Diseases
* Genomic data analysis
* Health economics
* R/RShiny
* Anime

:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
## Education

|||
|--------|---------------------------|------|
| M. Phil. | Biostatistics and Demography | 2021 |
| M. Sc. | Biostatistics and Demography | 2020 |
| B. Sc. | Statistics | 2018 |


:::
:::
